title: Quality pass: clippy pedantic cleanup in crossbridge (v1 bin)
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Run cargo clippy -p crossbridge with -W clippy::pedantic and resolve all 13 warnings. Top categories: unnecessary_wraps, single_match_else, similar_names, manual_let_else.

Acceptance criteria:
- cargo clippy -p crossbridge --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings exits 0.
- No blanket #[allow(clippy::pedantic)] over whole modules — fix the underlying issues, only allow specific lints with a one-line justification when the suggestion is genuinely worse.
- All existing tests still pass (cargo test -p crossbridge).
- cargo fmt --check clean.
